title: Investment Bank Lincoln International Seeks $421 Million in IPO
title_cn: 投资银行林肯国际寻求 4.21 亿美元的 IPO
summary: Mid-market investment bank Lincoln International Inc. and some of its backers are seeking to raise $421 million in a US initial public offering.

title: Choppin’ It Up: Matternet CEO Raptopoulos on Drone Delivery
title_cn: Choppin' It Up：Matternet 首席执行官 Raptopoulos 谈无人机交付
summary: The return on investment for drone delivery is attractive today and is going to get way more attractive over the next few years as the industry scales, Matternet founder and CEO Andreas Raptopoulos says on this episode of Bloomberg Intelligence’s Choppin’ It Up podcast. Raptopoulos joins BI senior restaurant and foodservice analyst Michael Halen to explore the cost and environmental benefits of autonomous drone networks. Raptopoulos also discusses an investment by SoftBank Robotics in Matternet

title: Dangote Said to Seek $50 Billion IPO Valuation for Refinery Arm
title_cn: 据称丹格特将为炼油厂寻求 500 亿美元的 IPO 估值
summary: Aliko Dangote, Africa’s richest person, is targeting a valuation of as much as $50 billion in a planned listing of his refinery business this year as higher oil prices boost its prospects, people with knowledge of the matter said.

title: US and Iran Wrangle Over Terms, Oil Rises with Hormuz Shut, More
title_cn: 美国和伊朗就条款争论不休，霍尔木兹海峡关闭导致油价上涨等等

title: Dubai’s Real Estate Market Gets a Vote of Confidence
title_cn: 迪拜房地产市场获得信任票
summary: “We understand the risks and benefits in the region better than others,” a top Brookfield executive said.

title: Oil Climbs as US-Iran Deadlock Lifts Bond Yields: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 美伊僵局提升债券收益率，油价攀升：市场总结
summary: A renewed advance in oil prices sent bonds lower after the US and Iran failed to agree on terms to end their war, dashing hopes for a revival of the Strait of Hormuz while stoking inflation concerns.

title: Crop Futures Advance Ahead of Key USDA Report, China Summit
title_cn: 美国农业部重要报告和中国峰会之前农作物期货上涨
summary: Grain and oilseed futures rose ahead of a key US government supply-and-demand report and a summit between President Donald Trump and Xi Jinping, who leads the world’s biggest importer of soybeans.

title: Goldman, BofA Delay Fed Cut Calls After ‘Last Straw’ Jobs Data
title_cn: 高盛和美国银行推迟美联储在就业数据“最后一根稻草”后降息的决定
summary: Goldman Sachs & Co and Bank of America Corp are the latest in a growing cohort of Wall Street banks pushing back their forecasts for interest-rate cuts, arguing that both jobs and inflation data make a case for the Federal Reserve to keep rates on hold until at least the end of the year.

title: Nvidia, Chipmakers Lift Stocks as Advance Defies War Jitters
title_cn: 英伟达和芯片制造商提振股价，因为进展克服了战争不安
summary: US equities are edging higher at midday Monday as strong earnings reports spurred bullish Wall Street strategists to raise their targets on the S&P 500 this year despite lingering concerns about the duration of the Iran war.

title: Copper Shrugs Off Middle East Uncertainty to Near Record High
title_cn: 铜价摆脱了中东的不确定性，接近历史新高
summary: Copper jumped the most in more than a month, nearing a record intraday high as it shrugged off the apparent deadlock between the US and Iran over how to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Aramco Sees Hormuz Halt Causing 100 Million-Barrel Oil Loss
title_cn: 沙特阿美公司认为霍尔木兹油田停运导致 1 亿桶石油损失
summary: Global oil markets are losing 100 million barrels every week the Strait of Hormuz is shut, compounding a supply shortage that has already made the Middle East war the most significant supply disruption ever, according to the head of Saudi Arabia’s state oil producer.

title: United Parks Loss Widens as Geopolitics Weigh on Visitor Numbers
title_cn: 由于地缘政治影响游客数量，联合公园损失扩大
summary: Shares of United Parks and Resorts Inc. fell after it reported a bigger-than-expected quarterly loss on Monday as attendance slipped due to fewer international visitors and unfavorable weather at its SeaWorld, Busch Gardens and Sesame Place theme parks.

title: Wall Street Veteran Yardeni Confident in S&P 500 Eclipsing 8,000
title_cn: 华尔街资深人士亚德尼对标普 500 指数跌破 8,000 点充满信心
summary: A blistering rally has pushed the S&P 500 Index back to all-time highs, and Wall Street veteran Ed Yardeni is confident the benchmark can breach 8,000 points by the end of 2026.

title: Fermi Wins Support Of Major Shareholder Amid Ex-CEO Fight
title_cn: 费米在前首席执行官之争中赢得大股东支持
summary: Fermi Inc. has won the backing of its second-largest shareholder as its former chief executive officer seeks a special meeting to seize control of the data-center developer’s board.

title: Emerging Currencies Weaken as Iran Conflict Dims Risk Appetite
title_cn: 伊朗冲突削弱风险偏好，新兴货币走弱
summary: Most emerging-market currencies fell against the dollar as oil traded above $105 a barrel and tensions in the Middle East escalated, with President Donald Trump and Iran’s leadership rejecting each other’s peace proposals and signaling no end in sight to the 10-week-old war.

title: Circle Surges Amid Optimism Over Own Blockchain, Legislation
title_cn: 由于对自己的区块链和立法的乐观情绪，Circle 激增
summary: Circle Internet Group Inc.’s shares jumped as much as 14% amid optimism over the prospects of the stablecoin issuer’s ARC blockchain project and as US lawmakers move toward considering a landmark digital asset bill.

title: Gold Gains as Traders Assess Latest Setbacks in US-Iran Talks
title_cn: 交易员评估美伊谈判最新挫折，金价上涨
summary: Gold advanced as traders assessed the latest setbacks surrounding US-Iran peace talks and the outlook for reopening the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Iran Says It’s Deployed Mini Subs in Contest to Control Hormuz
title_cn: 伊朗称其部署迷你潜艇以争夺控制霍尔木兹海峡
summary: Iran says it’s deployed small submarines to act as an “invisible guardian” of the Strait of Hormuz amid a series of rejected peace deals between Tehran and the US.

title: US to Temporarily Lower Beef Import Tariffs, WSJ Says
title_cn: 《华尔街日报》称美国将暂时降低牛肉进口关税
summary: The Trump administration is planning to temporarily reduce tariffs on beef imports as soon as Monday as it tries to bring down high beef prices, according to the Wall Street Journal.

title: When Central Banking Becomes Less Central
title_cn: 当中央银行变得不那么中心化时
summary: Monetary policy isn’t the most important macro question.

title: Oil Climbs as Trump Says US-Iran Ceasefire on ‘Life Support’
title_cn: 特朗普表示美伊停火是为了“维持生命”，油价上涨
summary: Oil rose after President Donald Trump said a fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran is weakening, prolonging their impasse and the effective closure of the crucial Strait of Hormuz.

title: Fertilizer Maker Mosaic Loses Out as Iran War Roils Inputs
title_cn: 化肥制造商马赛克因伊朗战争扰乱投入而遭受损失
summary: The war in Iran has sent fertilizer prices soaring, but that’s not creating a windfall for producer Mosaic Co.

title: Hedge Funds Move In as Litigation Finance Assets Slump
title_cn: 诉讼金融资产暴跌，对冲基金进场
summary: A losing streak in litigation finance is attracting hedge funds and other alternative investment managers looking to invest in legal claims at distressed valuations, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Megan Greene on How the BOE Is Dealing With Supply Side Shock
title_cn: 梅根·格林 (Megan Greene) 谈英国央行如何应对供给侧冲击
summary:
When global economies face one transitory shock after another, whether it's supply chain disruptions, the war in Ukraine or the war in Iran, are central banks equipped to deal with them?

Bank of England's Megan Greene joins Tracy Alloway and Joe Weisenthal on the Odd Lots podcast to discuss the compounding effects of all these shocks and why, for now, she remains squarely focused on the risks of higher inflation. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SEC Moves to End ‘Gag Rule’ Criticized by Musk and Cuban
title_cn: 美国证券交易委员会采取行动结束受到马斯克和库班批评的“禁言规则”
summary: The White House is reviewing a plan for the Securities and Exchange Commission to end its decades-old policy that lets companies and people settle enforcement actions without admitting wrongdoing if they also promise not to dispute the allegations.

title: Chile Signals Codelco Governance Overhaul Amid Debt Concerns
title_cn: 智利因债务担忧暗示Codelco将进行治理改革
summary: Chile’s new right-wing government is signaling an overhaul of Codelco’s corporate governance to ensure greater scrutiny of decision making at the heavily indebted state copper giant.

title: Activist Palliser Builds Stake in EQT Takeover Target Intertek
title_cn: 激进人士 Palliser 增持 EQT 收购目标 Intertek 股份
summary: Palliser Capital has amassed a stake in Intertek Group Plc, the British product-testing company that’s rejected multiple takeover offers from EQT AB, people with knowledge of the matter said.

title: Brazil’s Mastercard Rival Elo Taps Bank of America, Other Banks for US IPO
title_cn: 巴西万事达卡竞争对手 Elo 寻求美国银行和其他银行在美国首次公开募股
summary: Elo Servicos SA, the payments firm owned by Brazilian state and private lenders, has chosen banks to handle its long-awaited initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Oil Tanker That Exited Hormuz Comes to a Halt in Gulf of Oman
title_cn: 离开霍尔木兹的油轮在阿曼湾停下来
summary: An oil supertanker that exited the Persian Gulf on Sunday hauling a cargo of Iraqi crude has come to a halt as it was about to exit the Gulf of Oman for the Arabian Sea.

title: Bond CEO: Private Jet Demand Set to Surge
title_cn: Bond首席执行官：私人飞机需求将激增
summary: Bill Papariella, CEO of the private jet company Bond joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why the rich are about to fly even more, and why most aviation companies are getting it wrong.  Papariella breaks down the explosion in wealth, the hidden inefficiencies in private aviation, and how his company is betting billions on a more exclusive, less chaotic flying experience. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg Surveillance 5/11/2026
title_cn: 彭博社监测 2026 年 5 月 11 日
summary: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern speak daily with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. No other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Starz CEO: Niche Hits Drive Growth
title_cn: Starz 首席执行官：利基市场推动增长
summary: Starz CEO Jeffrey Hirsch breaks down how hits like Outlander are powering the company’s post-spinoff strategy. By targeting loyal niche audiences, leveraging big platforms like Amazon, and doubling down on franchise IP, Hirsch says Starz is proving you don’t need Netflix-scale to win in streaming. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Flex CEO Bets Big On AI
title_cn: Flex首席执行官在人工智能上押下重注
summary: Flex CEO Revathi Advaithi joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why she is leaving the top job to lead Flex’s AI infrastructure spinoff, a $6.5 billion business. She says the opportunity is bigger than just AI data centers. It's a a long-term transformation of power, cooling, and the electrical grid. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Peru Authorizes $2 Billion New Emergency Loan for Petroperu
title_cn: 秘鲁授权向 Petroperu 提供 20 亿美元新紧急贷款
summary: The Peruvian government on Monday authorized Petroperu to take on private loans in order to alleviate the liquidity crisis at the ailing state-owned oil firm.

title: Verizon’s Worldwide Hybrid Bond Sale Drive Hits $12 Billion
title_cn: Verizon 全球混合债券发行规模达 120 亿美元
summary: Verizon Communications Inc. is selling $4 billion of hybrid bonds in the US dollar investment-grade debt market for the first time after issuing the equivalent of $8 billion of them in other currencies over the last six months.

title: Meta Sued by California County Over ‘Scam’ Advertisements
title_cn: Meta 因“诈骗”广告被加州县起诉
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. was sued by Santa Clara County, California, over allegations that the company “knowingly facilitates and profits from billions of scam advertisements” on its social networks, including Facebook and Instagram.

title: BMO's Schleif Says AI Stampede Fueling Rally Beyond Tech
title_cn: BMO 的施莱夫表示，人工智能的狂潮推动了科技之外的反弹
summary: Carol Schleif, chief market strategist for Bank of Montreal, says the buildout of AI infrastructure is lifting a broad cross section of stocks, not just a handful of tech names. She speaks with Ed Ludlow and Caroline Hyde on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Market Optimistic on AI Surge, Ignoring Risks: Noviskis
title_cn: 市场对人工智能激增持乐观态度，忽视风险：Noviskis
summary: Jessica Noviskis, OCIO portfolio strategist at Marquette Associates, says market optimism is largely driven by strong earnings and the resurgence of the AI sector despite potential risks. "We are entirely pricing markets off of the good things that are happening," she said, "and ignoring the risks and the war and the potential for inflation and maybe rate hikes." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Michael Burry Warns of Stock Crash as Tech Jump Echoes 2000 Peak
title_cn: 迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 警告股市崩盘，科技跃升与 2000 年巅峰相呼应
summary: Michael Burry, the investor made famous in The Big Short, is warning that the Nasdaq 100 Index is headed toward a dramatic reversal after a “parabolic” surge that has driven technology valuations to unsustainable heights.

title: Why Stablecoins Are Crypto’s Real Payments Test
title_cn: 为什么稳定币是加密货币的真正支付测试
summary: Every year, Filipinos working overseas send $35 billion back home — and a growing share of those transfers are being executed using stablecoins. The blockchain technology promises to make cross-border payments cheaper and nearly instantaneous, offering an alternative to traditional remittance channels. But even though the opportunity could be huge, stablecoins remain a tiny part of the global payments system today. With the GENIUS Act set to take effect and banks eyeing the space, the race to scale is just getting started. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Investing in the Age of AI Disruption
title_cn: 投资人工智能颠覆时代
summary: Mike Pyle, Deputy Head of BlackRock's Portfolio Management Group joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why AI isn’t a bubble and how it’s  reshaping the global economy. He breaks down the short-term inflation hit vs. long-term productivity boom, and why traditional 60/40 portfolios are failing to diversify in an AI-dominated market. He also warns investors may be underestimating the economic risks from the Iran conflict, global oil disruptions, and the Strait of Hormuz crisis. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bartels Expects Secular Bear Market to Start Next Decade
title_cn: 巴特尔斯预计长期熊市将在下一个十年开始
summary: Mary Ann Bartels, chief investment strategist at Sanctuary Wealth, shares her long term outlook for stocks. She believes a secular bear market will kickoff the next decade after a nice rally over the next four years. She speaks on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Novo Hands Over Parkinson’s Therapy to Zuckerberg-Backed Startup
title_cn: Novo 将帕金森疗法移交给扎克伯格支持的初创公司
summary: Novo Nordisk A/S agreed to hand over an experimental therapy for Parkinson’s disease to a Mark Zuckerberg-backed AI startup to potentially speed its development.

title: Banks and Crypto Backers Tussle as Senators Eye Landmark Digital Asset Bill
title_cn: 参议员关注具有里程碑意义的数字资产法案，银行和加密货币支持者发生争执
summary: Banking groups are floating last-minute changes to a compromise on stablecoin yield as a key Senate panel begins considering a landmark digital asset bill.

title: Amazon Prepares to Sell First Swiss Franc Bond in AI Push
title_cn: 亚马逊准备发售首张瑞士法郎债券以推动人工智能发展
summary: Amazon.com, Inc. is preparing to issue Swiss franc bonds for the first time, as Big Tech hyperscalers turn to new debt markets to fund artificial intelligence spending.

title: UK Fintech Wise Makes US Trading Debut With Dual Listing
title_cn: 英国 Fintech Wise 通过双重上市在美国上市
summary: Wise Group Plc made its trading debut in the US with a Nasdaq listing as the financial technology firm tries to take advantage of a larger stock market and its legions of investors.

title: Retail Is Flooding Into the Chipmaker Rally as Moves Get Extreme
title_cn: 随着行动变得极端，零售业正涌入芯片制造商的涨势
summary: Retail traders largely sat out a record-setting advance in chip stocks in April. Now they’re diving in just as worries mount that the group’s rally may be losing steam.

title: OpenAI to Buy Consulting Firm for JV With Private Equity
title_cn: OpenAI 将与私募股权公司收购咨询公司成立合资企业
summary: OpenAI will acquire a consulting company to contribute to a new private equity-backed joint venture to help drive adoption of its artificial intelligence software across more businesses.

title: Bill Gates-Backed Fervo Energy Boosts IPO Target to $1.8 Billion
title_cn: 比尔·盖茨支持的 Fervo Energy 将 IPO 目标提高至 18 亿美元
summary: Fervo Energy Co., a geothermal energy developer, is seeking to raise as much as $1.82 billion in a US initial public offering, raising its target from $1.33 billion.

title: Google Says Hacker Used Mythos-Like AI for Software Tool Exploit
title_cn: 谷歌称黑客利用类似神话的人工智能来攻击软件工具
summary: Security researchers at Alphabet Inc.’s Google said they believe a cybercrime group used artificial intelligence to create a hacking tool that can bypass defenses in a widely-used tool to administer computer systems.

title: India Considering Emergency Measures to Save Foreign Exchange
title_cn: 印度考虑采取紧急措施节省外汇
summary: India is considering emergency steps to shore up foreign-exchange reserves, including curbing non-essential imports like gold and electronic goods, and hiking fuel prices, to help cushion the economy from the fallout of the Iran war, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Shein, Temu Trade Blows as UK Trial Spotlights Supply Chains
title_cn: 英国试验聚焦供应链，Shein 和 Temu 贸易爆发
summary: Chinese e-commerce giant Shein and rival Temu have swapped legal blows at the start of a UK trial that’s expected to shine a light on the world of ultra-fast fashion.

title: SoftBank’s Son in Talks for Major Data Center Project in France
title_cn: 软银之子正在洽谈法国主要数据中心项目
summary: SoftBank Group Corp. founder Masayoshi Son has held talks about unveiling an ambitious French AI data center project with President Emmanuel Macron in the coming weeks, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Microsoft’s African Data Center Falters on Payment Demands
title_cn: 微软非洲数据中心因付款要求而陷入困境
summary: A large Microsoft Corp. data center site in East Africa has been delayed by disagreements with the Kenyan government over the company’s request for guaranteed payments, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Inside a Year of Chaos and Conflict at Kevin Hart’s Media Company
title_cn: 凯文·哈特媒体公司混乱和冲突的一年
summary: A new deal with Authentic Brands is seen by some employees as the beginning of the end

title: Microsoft’s Marquee African Data Center Hits Political Stalemate
title_cn: 微软非洲数据中心陷入政治僵局
summary: The US tech firm, UAE partner G42 and the Kenyan government appear at an impasse

title: Rheinmetall and Deutsche Telekom Partner on German Drone Shield
title_cn: 莱茵金属与德国电信合作开发德国无人机盾
summary: Germany’s largest defense company and its biggest mobile phone carrier plan to jointly develop a defense shield against drones and acts of sabotage to protect critical infrastructure in their home country.

title: Behind the Claude Frenzy That Ate Up All the Mac Minis
title_cn: 克劳德疯狂吞噬所有 Mac Mini 的背后
summary: Apple’s entry-level desktop has become a vital piece of equipment for people using tools like OpenClaw to roll their own AIs for professional and personal tasks.

title: A $400 AI Bet That’s Actually a High-Stakes Wager on the Future of Work
title_cn: 400 美元的人工智能赌注实际上是对未来工作的高风险赌注
summary: Two prominent economists differ on how quickly artificial intelligence will reshape the US job market.

title: SoftBank Preps Forays Into AI Data Center Batteries and Chips
title_cn: 软银准备进军人工智能数据中心电池和芯片领域
summary: SoftBank Group Corp.’s mobile unit plans to expand into selling AI computing power and the manufacture of large-scale battery cells to address growing demand for AI-related hardware.

title: JPMorgan Says Equities at All-Time Highs 'Make Sense'
title_cn: 摩根大通表示股市处于历史高位“有道理”
summary: Grace Peters, global investment strategy co-head at JPMorgan Private Bank, discusses artificial intelligence investment, inflation risks and portfolio diversification. "We want to be in there for the equity bull market that we still see ahead, but we do think that there's still portfolio resilience that needed to be added to capitalize on some of these trends," Peters tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: JPMorgan Hikes Kospi Bull Case Target to 10,000 on Memory Boom
title_cn: 内存繁荣，摩根大通将 Kospi 牛市目标上调至 10,000 点
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. raised its target for South Korean stocks for the second time in less than a month, citing improvement in the semiconductor cycle, corporate governance reforms and industrial-sector growth.

title: Slovenia’s Nationalist Leader Backs Legislation Critics Say Favors Rich
title_cn: 斯洛文尼亚民族主义领导人支持立法批评者称有利于富人
summary: Slovenian lawmakers aligned with nationalist leader Janez Jansa pushed through a series of legislative amendments that critics say favor the Alpine country’s rich.

title: Trump to Sign Orders Monday Aimed at Lowering Beef Prices
title_cn: 特朗普周一签署命令旨在降低牛肉价格
summary: President Donald Trump will sign two executive orders Monday to try to lower beef prices, according to a White House official, the latest effort by the administration to counter high consumer prices ahead of November midterms.

title: Streeting Allies Urge Starmer to Go as Pressure on Premier Grows
title_cn: 随着总理面临的压力越来越大，街头盟友敦促斯塔默下台
summary: Allies of UK Health Secretary Wes Streeting joined the growing calls for Keir Starmer to step down as pressure mounted on the prime minister in the wake of last week’s disastrous local election results.

title: Trump Says He Will Discuss Taiwan Arms Sales at Xi Summit
title_cn: 特朗普表示将在习近平峰会上讨论对台军售问题
summary: President Donald Trump said he will discuss US arms sales to Taiwan with Chinese leader Xi Jinping at a meeting this week, a move that risks undermining America’s longstanding support for the island.

title: Trump Says He'll Talk About Selling Arms to Taiwan at Xi Summit
title_cn: 特朗普表示他将在习近平峰会上讨论向台湾出售武器
summary: President Donald Trump said he will discuss US arms sales to Taiwan with Chinese leader Xi Jinping at a meeting this week. “I’m going to have that discussion,” Trump said. “President Xi would like us not to. And I’ll have that discussion.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Musk, Cook Set to Join Trump for Xi Summit, White House Says
title_cn: 白宫称马斯克和库克将与特朗普一起参加习近平峰会
summary: The White House is inviting Tesla Inc.’s Elon Musk, Apple Inc.’s Tim Cook, Boeing Co.’s Kelly Ortberg and executives from other large companies to accompany President Donald Trump on his trip to China this week, according to an official.

title: Trump Says US-Iran Ceasefire on ‘Massive Life Support’
title_cn: 特朗普称美伊停火是为了“大规模生命支持”
summary: The ceasefire between the US and Iran reached a particularly precarious moment Monday as President Donald Trump said the agreement was on “massive life support” after he rejected Tehran’s latest peace offer.

title: Trump Floats Temporary US Gas Tax Halt as Pump Prices Soar
title_cn: 随着汽油价格飙升，特朗普提议暂时停止美国汽油税
summary: President Donald Trump voiced support for a gasoline tax holiday to counter rising prices at the pump, as the cost of oil soars while the war with Iran drags on.

title: Trump Downplays Hantavirus Concern, Says ‘Not Easy to Spread’
title_cn: 特朗普淡化汉坦病毒担忧，称“不易传播”
summary: US President Donald Trump said he is satisfied with the government’s response to the recent hantavirus outbreak on a cruise ship, stating that the virus is “not easy to spread.”

title: Trump Vows to Discuss Case of Imprisoned Jimmy Lai With Xi
title_cn: 特朗普誓言与习近平讨论黎智英被监禁案
summary: US President Donald Trump reiterated that he would raise the case of imprisoned Hong Kong businessman Jimmy Lai when he meets Chinese leader Xi Jinping at their summit this week.

title: US Navy Faces Rising Costs for Hormuz Missions With Strait Still Blocked
title_cn: 由于海峡仍被封锁，美国海军霍尔木兹海峡任务成本不断上升
summary: As long as the Strait of Hormuz remains unsettled, the US Navy faces millions of dollars in extra costs each time it sends a destroyer through the waterway, and such passages on their own are unlikely to reopen it.

title: Sean Duffy’s Reality Show Draws Ethics Concerns Over Sponsorships
title_cn: 肖恩·达菲的真人秀节目引发了对赞助的道德担忧
summary: Sean Duffy taped a reality TV show while leading the US Transportation Department, raising concerns about corporate sponsorships of the show from companies that are overseen by his department.

title: Trump Says Iran Ceasefire Is on 'Life Support'
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗停火处于“生命维持系统”
summary: President Donald Trump said the ceasefire between the US and Iran was on “massive life support” after he rejected Tehran’s latest peace offer. He speaks to reporters in the Oval Office. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ramaphosa to Address South Africa as Parliament Readies Inquiry
title_cn: 拉马福萨将在议会准备调查时向南非发表讲话
summary: South African President Cyril Ramaphosa will address the nation on Monday, a day before a report forming the basis of an impeachment committee’s probe into his actions is submitted to parliament.

title: Starmer Faces Mounting Calls to Step Aside Despite Plea for Time
title_cn: 尽管恳求时间，斯塔默仍面临越来越多的要求辞职的呼声
summary: Pressure built on Keir Starmer to lay out a time table for his departure after the British prime minister’s latest attempt at a reset fell short what of what critics said was needed to quell the rebellions within the Labour Party.

title: Gilts Drop as Calls Grow for UK Prime Minister to Step Down
title_cn: 随着英国首相下台的呼声越来越高，英国国债下跌
summary: UK bonds were swept up in another selloff as investors grew increasingly anxious about Britain’s finances, given the risk of fresh challenges to Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s leadership.

title: US Travel by Canadians Sees First Gain Since December 2024
title_cn: 加拿大人赴美旅游自 2024 年 12 月以来首次增长
summary: Canadian travel to the US posted its first increase since the end of 2024, though the rebound is modest and largely reflects a comparison with low cross-border trips last year.

title: US, Iran Far Apart in Talks to End War and Reopen Hormuz
title_cn: 美国和伊朗在结束战争和重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的谈判中分歧很大
summary: The US and Iran remain far apart on a framework to end their war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, with President Donald Trump saying he’s looking at reviving a plan to escort ships out of the Persian Gulf.

title: Starmer Fights To Save His Premiership
title_cn: 斯塔默为保住英超冠军而奋斗
summary:
Keir Starmer vowed to prove his critics wrong in a speech to save his premiership following bruising local elections.

Lizzy Burden explains how the markets reacted. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How Cash-in-a-Sofa Scandal Threatens to Topple South Africa’s Ramaphosa
title_cn: 沙发现金丑闻如何威胁南非拉马福萨的垮台
summary: A scandal that led South African President Cyril Ramaphosa to consider resigning four years ago has come back to haunt him.

title: Agents Chase Philippine Senator Tied to ICC Case Amid Duterte Impeachment Chaos
title_cn: 在杜特尔特弹劾混乱中，特工追捕与国际刑事法院案件有关的菲律宾参议员
summary: A Philippine lawmaker facing an arrest warrant from the International Criminal Court was chased through the hall of the Senate on Monday by authorities, a bizarre sideshow to the drama playing out between President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. and his vice-president and arch-nemesis, Sara Duterte.

title: EU Backs Sanctions on Violent Israeli West Bank Settlers
title_cn: 欧盟支持对以色列西岸定居者实施暴力制裁
summary: The European Union reached a political agreement to sanction violent settlers in the West Bank, marking the first time the bloc has been able to get unanimous backing for punitive measures against Israel since the height of the Gaza crisis.

title: Norden Is Assuming Its Ships Will Be Stuck in Hormuz All Year
title_cn: Norden 预计其船只将全年被困在霍尔木兹
summary: One of the world’s largest commodity shipping companies is planning for a scenario in which the Strait of Hormuz remains effectively shut for the rest of the year, highlighting how the Iran conflict is upending expectations across the maritime cargo industry.

title: Gala Shooting Suspect Pleads Not Guilty to Trying to Kill Trump
title_cn: 晚会枪击嫌疑人对试图杀死特朗普无罪
summary: The man accused of trying to assassinate President Donald Trump at a Washington hotel gala last month pleaded not guilty during a hearing in federal court Monday.

title: No New Bureaucracy to Police AI Products, Hassett Says
title_cn: 哈塞特表示，没有新的官僚机构来监管人工智能产品
summary: The Trump administration is still working through its plans for oversight of cutting-edge AI models, but doesn’t envision a big new agency for the job, according to White House National Economic Council Director Kevin Hassett.

title: Qatar’s LNG Tanker U-Turns After Attempt to Pass Through Hormuz
title_cn: 卡塔尔液化天然气油轮试图通过霍尔木兹海峡后掉头
summary: A tanker loaded with liquefied natural gas from Qatar appeared to have turned back from the Strait of Hormuz after initially approaching the waterway, reflecting continued uncertainty over regional energy flows.

title: Drone Strikes Kill Nearly 900 Sudan Civilians This Year, UN Says
title_cn: 联合国表示，无人机袭击今年导致近 900 名苏丹平民死亡
summary: Drone strikes have killed at least 880 civilians in Sudan this year, with the civil war likely to widen in the coming weeks and put non-combatants further at risk, the United Nations said.

title: China’s Policies Threaten $650 Billion in G-7, US Chamber Says
title_cn: 美国商会称，中国的政策对七国集团造成 6500 亿美元的威胁
summary: China’s industrial strategy threatens hundreds of billions of dollars worth of industrial output in the world’s most advanced economies, posing a danger of hollowing out their industrial capabilities, according to a release from the largest American business lobby.
